issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu toggle does not update aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The `openInstance` and `closeInstance` functions in the dropdown menu controller change the visibility of the panel but never set or update the `aria-expanded` attribute on the trigger button, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the menu state.
issuesFound.fix: In `openInstance` add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; in `closeInstance` add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion panel open does not set aria‑expanded true
issuesFound.explanation: The `open` function for FAQ items updates the panel visibility but never sets `aria-expanded="true"` on the trigger button, breaking the ARIA disclosure pattern.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')` at the start of the `open` function.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion trigger missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ items are parsed without an initial `aria-expanded` attribute on their trigger buttons, so the default collapsed state is not conveyed to assistive tech.
issuesFound.fix: In `faqRegistry.parse`, after creating the trigger, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')` if the attribute is absent.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid newsletter email field
issuesFound.explanation: The newsletter form binds the email input to `inlineValidator`, which marks the field as invalid visually but never adds `aria-invalid="true"`, leaving screen‑reader users unaware of the error.
issuesFound.fix: In `inlineValidator.validate`, after detecting an invalid result, call `field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true')`; on valid, remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid contact form “Full name” field
issuesFound.explanation: The contact form’s “Full name” input is validated with `inlineValidator` but the validation routine does not set `aria-invalid="true"` on error, so the error is not announced.
issuesFound.fix: Extend `inlineValidator.validate` to set `aria-invalid="true"` on the field when the result is invalid and remove it when valid.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid contact form “Email address” field
issuesFound.explanation: Same as Issue 6 for the email input; missing `aria-invalid` prevents screen‑reader error notification.
issuesFound.fix: Same as Issue 6 – ensure `aria-invalid` is applied on validation failure.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid contact form “Message” textarea
issuesFound.explanation: The message textarea is validated but the validation does not set `aria-invalid="true"` on error, so assistive technologies cannot convey the problem.
issuesFound.fix: Modify `inlineValidator.validate` to set `aria-invalid="true"` when the textarea fails validation and clear it on success.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not set aria‑invalid on invalid contact form “Privacy consent” checkbox
issuesFound.explanation: The required consent checkbox is validated but the validation routine does not set `aria-invalid="true"` when unchecked, leaving the error invisible to screen‑reader users.
issuesFound.fix: In the validation path for the consent checkbox, add `field.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true')` when the rule fails and remove it when the box is checked.

issuesFound.title: Inline validator does not clear aria‑invalid on valid newsletter email field
issuesFound.explanation: When the newsletter email field becomes valid after a previous error, `inlineValidator` removes the visual error but does not remove `aria-invalid`, so the field remains announced as invalid.
issuesFound.fix: In `inlineValidator.validate`, when the result is valid, call `field.removeAttribute('aria-invalid')`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle does not reset aria‑expanded on close
issuesFound.explanation: The `mobileNav.close()` function removes CSS classes and scroll‑lock but never sets `aria‑expanded="false"` on the trigger button. The button remains announced as expanded after the drawer is closed.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` inside `close()`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu open does not set aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: `_openInstance()` removes the `hidden` attribute from the panel and adds an open class, but does not set `aria‑expanded="true"` on the associated trigger button. Screen readers cannot detect the open state.
issuesFound.fix: Insert `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after opening the panel.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu close does not reset aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: `_closeInstance()` hides the panel but never sets `aria‑expanded="false"` on the trigger button, leaving the button incorrectly announced as expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` before hiding the panel.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open does not set aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: `faqAccordion.open()` expands the answer panel but does not set `aria‑expanded="true"` on the question button (`item.trigger`). Users of assistive technology cannot tell which FAQ item is open.
issuesFound.fix: Call `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` when opening an item.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion close does not reset aria‑expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: `faqAccordion.close()` collapses the answer panel but never sets `aria‑expanded="false"` on the trigger button, so the button remains announced as expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` before collapsing the panel.

issuesFound.title: Product filter count badge updates are not announced
issuesFound.explanation: `_updateCountBadge()` changes the text of the count badge but does not send an announcement to a live region. Users relying on screen readers are unaware of the new result count.
issuesFound.fix: After updating the badge, call `liveRegion.announce(`${count} products found`);` or use an existing live region.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: On page load the hamburger button (`SELECTORS.navToggle`) has no `aria‑expanded` attribute, violating JS‑E (initialisation). Assistive technologies assume the drawer is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: In `mobileNav.init()`, after locating `_trigger`, set `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu triggers missing initial aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown trigger buttons lack an initial `aria‑expanded="false"` attribute, so their collapsed state is not conveyed to AT.
issuesFound.fix: In `dropdownMenu.register()`, after ensuring `aria-haspopup`, also set `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown panels are not cleared of aria‑hidden when shown
issuesFound.explanation: `_openInstance()` removes the `hidden` attribute but does not set `aria‑hidden="false"` on the panel, leaving it hidden from AT despite being visible.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(inst.panel, 'aria-hidden', 'false');` when opening the panel.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown panels retain aria‑hidden when hidden via CSS class
issuesFound.explanation: `_closeInstance()` adds a CSS class to hide the panel but does not set `aria‑hidden="true"`; the panel remains perceivable to AT while visually hidden.
issuesFound.fix: Call `setAttr(inst.panel, 'aria-hidden', 'true');` before adding the hide class.

issuesFound.title: Sticky header hide/show actions lack live‑region announcements
issuesFound.explanation: The `stickyHeader` component adds/removes the hidden class on scroll but never announces the state change via a live region. Users cannot know when the header disappears or reappears.
issuesFound.fix: After emitting `header:hide` or `header:show`, also call `liveRegion.announce('Header hidden')` or `liveRegion.announce('Header shown')`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation trigger missing aria‑controls
issuesFound.explanation: The element selected by `SELECTORS.navToggle` (the hamburger button) never receives an `aria-controls` attribute that points to the navigation drawer (`SELECTORS.mainNav`). Without this relationship screen readers cannot locate the controlled region.
issuesFound.fix: After locating the drawer element, add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-controls', srUtils.ensureId(_drawer, 'nav-drawer'))`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion triggers never set aria‑expanded
issuesFound.explanation: In `faqAccordion.open()` and `faqAccordion.close()` the trigger button’s `aria-expanded` attribute is never updated. The markup only sets the attribute initially; subsequent state changes are invisible to AT.
issuesFound.fix: In `open(item)` call `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true')`; in `close(item)` call `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Billing‑period toggle button missing aria‑pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The element with `[data-billing-toggle]` acts as a binary switch (monthly ↔ annual) but never receives an `aria-pressed` state. Users of assistive tech cannot tell which period is active.
issuesFound.fix: In `_onToggleClick()` (or after `setPeriod()`), update `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-pressed', period === 'year' ? 'true' : 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: Billing‑period toggle button missing aria‑controls
issuesFound.explanation: The billing‑period toggle does not reference the pricing cards it controls via `aria-controls`. This breaks the required relationship between the switch and the region it updates.
issuesFound.fix: Add `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-controls', srUtils.ensureId(_priceContainer, 'pricing-cards'))` where `_priceContainer` is the element that contains the plan cards.

issuesFound.title: Testimonials carousel navigation buttons lack accessible labels
issuesFound.explanation: The “previous” and “next” buttons (`[data-carousel-prev]`, `[data-carousel-next]`) are created without `aria-label` or visible text, leaving screen‑reader users without context.
issuesFound.fix: After selecting the buttons, add `setAttr(prevBtn, 'aria-label', 'Previous testimonial')` and `setAttr(nextBtn, 'aria-label', 'Next testimonial')`.

issuesFound.title: Carousel play/pause button missing aria‑pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The autoplay toggle (`[data-carousel-play]`) changes state but does not expose its state via `aria-pressed`, making it impossible for AT users to know whether autoplay is active.
issuesFound.fix: In `togglePlay()` (or after state change) call `setAttr(_playBtn, 'aria-pressed', _playing ? 'true' : 'false')`.

issuesFound.title: File‑upload zone does not expose aria‑describedby for status
issuesFound.explanation: The status element (`[data-upload-status]`) is created with `aria-live="polite"` but the upload zone itself never references it via `aria-describedby`. Users cannot discover the status region when focus is on the drop zone.
issuesFound.fix: After creating `_statusEl`, call `setAttr(_zoneEl, 'aria-describedby', srUtils.ensureId(_statusEl, 'upload-status'))`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation overlay missing aria‑hidden when hidden
issuesFound.explanation: The overlay element (`_overlay`) is hidden with the `hidden` attribute but does not receive `aria-hidden="true"` when not visible. Some ATs rely on `aria-hidden` to ignore off‑screen content.
issuesFound.fix: When hiding the overlay, add `setAttr(_overlay, 'aria-hidden', 'true')`; when showing, remove the attribute.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle functions missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The open() and close() functions in the mobileNav module add and remove CSS classes to show or hide the navigation drawer, but neither function updates the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button. issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu toggle functions missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The _openInstance() and _closeInstance() functions manage dropdown panel visibility but do not synchronise the aria-expanded state on the trigger button. This prevents screen reader users from knowing when a dropdown menu is open or closed.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2260 (in _openInstance): Add setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true'); Line 2270 (in _closeInstance): Add setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open function missing aria-expanded="true"
issuesFound.explanation: While the close() function sets aria-expanded="false" on the trigger, the open() function does not set aria-expanded="true". This leaves screen readers unaware that the accordion panel has expanded, even though the visual state changes.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3550 (in open()): Add setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true'); immediately after setting item.open = true;

issuesFound.title: productFilter tabs missing aria-pressed state
issuesFound.explanation: The _syncTabAriaStates() function toggles visual active states on filter tab buttons but does not update the aria-pressed attribute. These buttons act as toggles that filter the product grid, so they must communicate their pressed state to assistive technologies.

issuesFound.title: Textarea missing aria-invalid attribute

issuesFound.title: ContactForm inputs broken aria-describedby references
